headline: Albemarle Corporation to Release Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on Wednesday, August 5, 2026
summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a global leader in providing essential elements for mobility, energy, connectivity and health, announced today that it will release its second quarter 2026 earnings after the NYSE closes on Wednesday, August 5, 2026.

headline: Ingevity Shares Rise 25% YTD: Can the Stock Sustain the Rally?

headline: Here's Why You Should Hold Onto ArcelorMittal Stock for Now
summary: MT gains from expansion, record Liberia iron ore shipments and a value-added steel push, even as weakness in China and heavy capex weigh on it.

headline: ESI to Be Acquired by Solstice, Creating Advanced Materials Leader
